book_definitions.J1: Low-turnover p90 replay turnover <= J0 70th percentile.
book_definitions.J2: Balanced cluster-level concentration filter over J1.
book_definitions.J4: J2 plus liquidity/capacity proxy and limit/suspension feasibility filters.

bias_scope.lookahead: liquidity amount/volume uses 20-day shifted rolling means; market-cap fields are treated as PIT proxy from current dataset
bias_scope.costs: strict cost-adjusted sortino and 10bps replay cost are inherited from Phase3I rows
bias_scope.capacity: proxy only; no live execution model
